credits.title: Credits
credits.subtitle: Credits power AI generation. EUR/USD packs use Ameriabank checkout. AMD/RUB packs create a pending bank/manual payment request.
credits.packsHelp: Select an enabled currency from the header. Ameriabank is used for EUR/USD; AMD/RUB stay pending until bank payment is confirmed.

banners.title: Banners for stores and campaigns
banners.subtitle: Start from a reusable sample, place your text, choose a production size, or prepare an advanced AI prompt with references.
banners.customizeHelp: Preview text and size choices before generating an orderable banner.
banners.advancedHelp: Advanced generation will spend credits and save the resulting banner as a generated item.

banner.textPlaceholder: Text to place inside the banner
banner.unavailable: Publish an admin banner sample and size preset before ordering a customized sample.
banner.promptPlaceholder: Describe the store, offer, brand colors, attached references, and desired banner style.
banner.rights: I have the rights to use the uploaded reference image.
banner.disclaimer: Generated banner previews are approximations and require admin production review before manufacturing.

auth.loginSubtitle: Log in to your Uniqraft account.
auth.verificationNotice: We'll send you a verification email to confirm.
auth.verificationSentTo: We sent a verification link to {email}. Click the link to activate your account.
auth.spamNotice: Not seeing it? Check your spam folder. Links expire after 24 hours.
auth.enterCode: Enter the 6-digit code from your email
auth.orClickLink: or click the link in the email
auth.login_required: Log in or create an account to continue.

dashboard.title: Your products
dashboard.subtitle: Saved products and generated marketplace items, newest first.

empty.title: Nothing here yet
empty.description: Your saved products, personalized designs, and orders will appear here.

personalizedList.title: Personalized night lights
personalizedList.subtitle: Choose a model, upload images, set a comfortable LED color, and generate preview options before ordering.
personalizedList.empty: Personalized models will appear here after an admin publishes them.
personalizedList.modelHelp: Generates 3 preview options from up to 3 uploaded images.

profile.shortcutsHelp: Manage your creations, credits, and shopping activity.

nightLight.title: Personalized night light
nightLight.sectionIntro: Choose the styles you want, upload one image, select a light color, and optionally add personalized text. Each selected style costs one credit.
nightLight.mockAlt: Portrait personalized acrylic night light glowing on a bedside table
nightLight.mockAltHalloween: Round personalized night light with a Halloween illustration
nightLight.mockAltBunny: Personalized night light with a floral bunny portrait and name
nightLight.popularEmpty: Popular night lights are coming soon.
nightLight.signInBody: You can browse models as a guest, but generation uses your uploads, credit balance, and saved preview history.
nightLight.chooseTemplatesHelp: Select one or more. Each style creates a separate design.
nightLight.upload: Upload one PNG, JPG, or WEBP image
nightLight.generatingBody: We are adapting your photo to every selected style. This can take a little while.
nightLight.resultsHelp: Select one or more designs to add to your cart.
nightLight.noTemplates: No night-light styles are available right now.
nightLight.errorUpload: Upload exactly one PNG, JPG, or WEBP image.
nightLight.errorText: Personalized text must be 80 characters or fewer.
nightLight.errorModel: This personalization model is not available right now.
nightLight.errorStyle: One or more selected styles are no longer available. Refresh and try again.
nightLight.errorBalance: We could not verify your credit balance. Please try again.
nightLight.errorGeneration: We could not generate your night-light designs. Please try again. Your credits were refunded.

generated.selectPreview: Select a valid preview before adding this item to your cart.

landing.meta_description: Browse handcrafted laser-cut products and generate custom night lights, decorations, toys, and banners.
landing.title: Wooden gifts, kits, decor, and custom night lights.
landing.subtitle: Buy ready-made laser-cut products, or spend credits to generate supported custom designs from your own image.
landing.popular_subtitle: Admin-selected products from the marketplace catalog.
landing.popular_empty: Popular marketplace items will appear here after the catalog migration is applied.

catalog.title: Marketplace catalog
catalog.meta_description: Browse ready-made wooden toys, constructor kits, decorations, night lights, and marketing banners.
catalog.subtitle: Browse ready-made wooden toys, constructor kits, decorations, night lights, and marketing banners.

categories.title: Explore categories
categories.subtitle: Ready-made products, custom generation entry points, and production-aware options grouped for quick browsing.

toys.name: Toys
toys.description: Wooden play objects, models, and giftable kits.

constructors.name: Constructors
constructors.description: Assembly kits and buildable laser-cut sets.

decorations.name: Decorations
decorations.description: Home and event decor with production-ready details.

night-lights.name: Night lights
night-lights.description: Acrylic and wooden LED gifts, including personalized designs.

banners.name: Banners
banners.description: Marketing banners for stores, campaigns, and promotions.

personalized.name: Personalized
personalized.description: Personalized products generated from your images and text.

product.buy_tooltip: Checkout arrives with the orders milestone.

cart.title: Shopping cart
cart.empty_description: Add a catalog or generated item to start an order.
cart.resolve_issues: Resolve the item messages before checkout.

issue.price_changed: The item price changed. Please review it before checkout.
issue.item_unavailable: This item is no longer available.
issue.generated_item_not_orderable: This generated item cannot be ordered.
issue.missing_production_asset: This item is missing a required production file.
issue.currency_disabled: This currency is unavailable. Switch currency or add the item again.
issue.market_unavailable: This item is not sold in your destination country.
issue.shipping_unavailable: Shipping is not available for this item and destination.

checkout.destination_help: Changing destination refreshes availability, currency defaults, and shipping.
checkout.select_country: Select a country from the header before checkout.
checkout.title: Checkout
checkout.review_help: Confirm the saved cart snapshot before creating an order.
checkout.payment_note: Payment provider checkout will attach to this order in the payment slice.
checkout.resolve_issues: Resolve cart issues before creating an order.

generation.rights_confirmation: I have the rights to use the uploaded image.
generation.preview_disclaimer: Generated previews are approximations and require production review.

validation.invalid_image: Upload a PNG, JPG, WEBP, or SVG image.

personalization.title: Personalization
personalization.subtitle: Choose a product category to manage its customer templates.
personalization.manage: Manage models, template images, and production options.
personalization.unavailable: Template customization is not available yet.
personalization.nightLightsSubtitle: Manage customer-facing models, preview images, and production boilerplates.
personalization.boilerplateHelp: Customers can choose any active option. Mark whether production requires an admin-generated manufacturing SVG.
personalization.replaceImageHelp: Choose a file to replace the current image.
personalization.uploadHelp: Upload PNG, JPG, WEBP, or SVG up to 10 MB.
